umm.digiquilt.server
Interface ConnectionHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
DQPHandler
public interface ConnectionHandler

Interface for classes which can communicate over a network or other one-on one stream connection.

Version:
$Revision: 1.2 $
Author:
Jason Biatek, last changed by $Author: biatekjt $ on $Date: 2009-07-06 00:45:14 $

Method Summary
 ConnectionHandler cloneHandler()
          This should essentially do the same thing as calling the constructor for this object, returning a new instance.
 void handleConnection(InputStream in, OutputStream out)
          Take over talking to a peer.
 

Method Detail

cloneHandler

ConnectionHandler cloneHandler()
This should essentially do the same thing as calling the constructor for this object, returning a new instance.

Returns:
a new instance of this ConnectionHandler;

handleConnection

void handleConnection(InputStream in,
                      OutputStream out)
Take over talking to a peer. The protocol/behavior is up to the implementing class.

Parameters:
in - Input coming from the peer.
out - Output to the other peer.
